title: Data Sharing Docs Source Metadata Batch 4
content_html:
Batch 4: Contract Tests and Stale-Path Guards

This is the delivery specification for Batch 4 in Data Sharing Docs Source Metadata Tasks.

Batch 4: Contract Tests and Stale-Path Guards

Summary: Add guard coverage proving Data Sharing is independent of generated publication artifacts.

ID status action
4.1 done Add focused tests proving selectable records, export/package preparation, source-text extraction, and returned-package review context work when public assets/data/docs/scopes/<scope>/index.json is absent.
4.2 done Add focused tests proving those same flows work when generated by-id payloads are absent.
4.3 done Add focused tests or scans proving Data Sharing metadata does not read public nested index-tree.json, search payloads, recently-added payloads, manage/local generated index.json, or generated metadata JSON.
4.4 done Update existing fixtures in docs-viewer/tests/python/test_docs_export.py, docs-viewer/tests/python/test_docs_import.py, docs-viewer/tests/python/test_docs_import_service.py, studio/tests/python/test_data_sharing_adapters.py, and related tests so generated docs payload fixtures are used only for Docs Viewer generated-data behavior, not Data Sharing metadata behavior.
4.5 done Add missing-source, duplicate-doc-id, unresolved-parent, and rendering-error tests with expected user-facing warnings/errors.
4.6 done Add guard scans for hard-coded assets/data/docs/scopes/<scope>/index.json, docs-viewer/generated/docs/<scope>/index.json, and generated by-id reads in active Data Sharing-owned service paths.
4.7 done Update any smoke/API tests only when browser or API route behavior changed during Batch 3.
4.8 done Run focused syntax, pytest, guard scans, and optional smoke checks, then record results and handoff notes for Batch 5.

Steer for these tasks

  • Tests should enforce the current architecture, not preserve historical generated-data shapes.
  • Avoid brittle tests that assert implementation internals unrelated to the Data Sharing boundary.
  • Negative-path tests should fail if generated publication artifacts become required for Data Sharing metadata again.

Deliverables

  • Positive behavior tests without generated publication artifacts.
  • Negative dependency guards.
  • Updated fixtures that distinguish source metadata behavior from Docs Viewer generated-data behavior.
  • Batch 5 handoff with remaining docs and cleanup items.

Implementation and policy guidance

  • Keep permanent tests phrased around the Data Sharing source metadata contract.
  • Do not keep temporary compatibility assertions.
  • Generated publication artifacts may still appear in tests for Docs Viewer publication behavior; the guard applies to Data Sharing metadata workflows.

Proposed verification set

  • $HOME/miniconda3/bin/python3 -m py_compile for changed tests and services.
  • Focused pytest for Data Sharing/export/import source metadata tests.
  • Focused rg stale-path scans against active Data Sharing-owned service paths.
  • Local Analytics/Data Sharing smoke only when API/browser route behavior changes.
  • git diff --check.

completed verification

  • 2026-06-05: $HOME/miniconda3/bin/python3 -m py_compile docs-viewer/services/docs_data_sharing/package.py docs-viewer/services/docs_export.py docs-viewer/services/docs_import.py docs-viewer/tests/python/test_docs_data_sharing_source_metadata.py docs-viewer/tests/python/test_docs_export.py docs-viewer/tests/python/test_docs_import.py docs-viewer/tests/python/test_docs_import_service.py studio/tests/python/test_data_sharing_adapters.py passed.
  • 2026-06-05: $HOME/miniconda3/bin/python3 -m pytest docs-viewer/tests/python/test_docs_data_sharing_source_metadata.py docs-viewer/tests/python/test_docs_export.py docs-viewer/tests/python/test_docs_import.py docs-viewer/tests/python/test_docs_import_service.py studio/tests/python/test_data_sharing_adapters.py passed with 80 tests.
  • 2026-06-05: rg -n "docs_index|docs_payload_root|generated_docs_index|read_generated_docs_index|DOCS_SCOPES_ROOT|doc_payload_path|load_doc_payload|current_payload_missing|parent_payload_missing|metadata-index|tooling-index" docs-viewer/services/docs_data_sharing docs-viewer/services/docs_export.py docs-viewer/services/docs_import.py data-sharing/config/adapters.json studio/tests/python/test_data_sharing_adapters.py returned no matches.
  • 2026-06-05: git diff --check passed.
  • No browser/API smoke was run; Batch 4 changed service tests and adapter config only, with no route or UI behavior change.

follow-on tasks

  • Batch 5 should move the final source metadata contract into durable Data Sharing, Docs Viewer generated-data/source-data, and adapter config docs.
  • Batch 5 should run docs-language cleanup scans for stale statements that describe public flat indexes, manage/local generated docs indexes, generated by-id payloads, search payloads, recently-added payloads, or generated metadata JSON as Data Sharing metadata sources.
  • The remaining assets/data/docs/scopes/library/references/index.json fixture in docs-viewer/tests/python/test_docs_import_service.py is for Docs Viewer reference rebuild behavior during summary apply, not Data Sharing document metadata.

task close

  • Batch 4 is complete. Contract guard coverage passed focused syntax, pytest, stale-path scans, and whitespace checks. No explicit generated docs write command was run.
